channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Air Canada Jet Collides with Fire Truck at LaGuardia, Two Pilots Killed
item.description: Late on Sunday night, an Air Canada Bombardier CRJ900 carrying 76 people crashed at New York’s LaGuardia Airport, colliding with a fire truck on the runway. Both Canadian pilots were killed in the inc...

item.title: Lancashire mother ordered to demolish £180,000 home extension after planning dispute with council
item.description: A mother of four from Aughton, Lancashire, claims she and her family could be left homeless after West Lancashire Council ordered her to demolish a £180,000 two-storey extension to her home. Suzie Cav...

item.title: Pemba Communities Work Together to End Gender-Based Violence
item.description: More than 3,500 people from seven shehias in Mkoani District, Pemba, have taken part in community dialogues meant to address the growing problem of gender-based violence (GBV) against women and girls....

item.title: Advocacy group calls for concrete action against rising antisemitic incidents in Ontario
item.description: As Ontario’s legislature resumes, the Centre for Israel and Jewish Affairs (CIJA) is pressing the provincial government to take immediate and concrete steps to address a surge in antisemitic incidents...

item.title: Brian Brobbey Secures Late Winner as Sunderland Beat Newcastle in Tyne-Wear Derby
item.description: For real, last night na proper football wahala for St James' Park as Sunderland dey turn table on Newcastle United. Newcastle first score early for 9th minute when Anthony Gordon put dem ahead, and e ...

item.title: Delhi Traffic Diversions Around Jhandewalan Temple During Navratri
item.description: The Delhi Traffic Police has issued an advisory regarding traffic restrictions in central Delhi around Jhandewalan Temple due to the ongoing Navratri celebrations from March 23 to March 27. Heavy vehi...

item.title: ACTU calls for 5% minimum wage increase to help low-paid workers cope with cost-of-living pressures
item.description: The Australian Council of Trade Unions (ACTU) is requesting a 5 per cent increase to the nation’s minimum wage, aiming to assist roughly 3 million low-paid workers facing rising living costs. If appro...

item.title: Overview of Canada’s Current Immigration and Border Challenges
item.description: Canada experienced a rare population decline in 2025, with numbers dropping from 41,574,081 at the start of the year to 41,472,081 by year-end. This follows a post-COVID migration surge from 2022, dur...

item.title: Kindiki Responds to Gachagua Over Meru Banditry Threats
item.description: Deputy President Kithure Kindiki has dismissed former Deputy President Rigathi Gachagua's threat to mobilise residents in Meru to confront cattle rustlers, calling it 'empty and childish'. Gachagua ha...

item.title: UK issues updated travel advice for Cyprus after drone incident at RAF Akrotiri
item.description: Following a suspected drone impact at RAF Akrotiri, a British military base in Cyprus, the UK Foreign, Commonwealth & Development Office (FCDO) has issued updated travel advice for British nationals. ...

item.title: Pakistan Day celebrated with flag-raising ceremonies across the UAE
item.description: Pakistan Day was commemorated across the United Arab Emirates (UAE) on Monday with flag-raising ceremonies at the Pakistani Embassy in Abu Dhabi and the Consulate in Dubai. The events took place under...

item.title: Tanzania Seeks Investment for Major Energy Projects Worth $12.9 Billion
item.description: Tanzania imedekea fursa kubwa ya uwekezaji katika sekta ya nishati yenye thamani ya dola bilioni 12.9 (kama 33.23tri/-), kama sehemu ya mkakati wa kuongeza ukuaji wa uchumi na kuboresha upatikanaji wa...

item.title: Sahibzada Farhan awarded ICC Player of the Month for February after standout T20 World Cup performance
item.description: Pakistan opener Sahibzada Farhan has been named ICC Men’s Player of the Month for February 2026 following his outstanding batting at the ICC Men’s T20 World Cup held in Sri Lanka. Farhan topped the sc...

item.title: Jony Ive Designs a Minimalist Light-Based Clock with Balmuda
item.description: After three decades defining the look and feel of modern technology, renowned designer Jony Ive has turned his focus to an object rooted in tradition—the clock. In partnership with Tokyo-based design ...

item.title: A showcase of Australian political cartoons for 24 March 2026
item.description: This article, published by The Sydney Morning Herald on 23 March 2026, presents a visual gallery titled 'Best of cartoons, March 24, 2026'. It is part of the paper’s ongoing series that curates editor...

item.title: Zanzibar and TTCL strengthen partnership to improve communications across the Isles
item.description: The Revolutionary Government of Zanzibar has reaffirmed its commitment to continue working closely with the Tanzania Telecommunications Corporation (TTCL) in strengthening communication services throu...

item.title: Former Acting Accountant-General Gets 72-Year Jail Term for ₦868 Million Fraud
item.description: A Federal High Court sitting in Abuja don sentence the former Acting Accountant-General of the Federation, Chukwunyere Nwabuoku, to 72 years imprisonment over a ₦868 million money laundering case. Jus...

item.title: Mandla Tsheole credits Irvin Khoza for stabilising Orlando Pirates and transforming South African football
item.description: Orlando Pirates legend Mandla “Metroblitz” Tsheole has openly praised club chairman Irvin Khoza, crediting him with rescuing both the club and South African football during a difficult period. Speakin...

item.title: PM Modi addresses Parliament on West Asia conflict and its impact on energy and economy
item.description: On March 23, 2026, Prime Minister Narendra Modi addressed the Lok Sabha regarding the ongoing West Asia conflict, terming the situation as worrisome due to its adverse impact on the global economy and...

item.title: SB19 reveals full 24-track lineup for upcoming ‘Wakas at Simula’ album
item.description: Ibinahagi ng P-pop group na SB19 ang ilang detalye tungkol sa kanilang inaabangang album na “Wakas at Simula,” na binubuo ng kabuuang 24 na tracks. Ayon sa ulat, ang proyekto ay inaasahang magsisilbin...
